content.rendered: Sanjoy has been a core member of AMI since 1991 contributing various platform firmware technologies and assumed his current role in 2019. Sanjoy previously headed the Manageability Solutions Business Unit at AMI, where he designed and built the industry’s first true out-of-band manageability solution. With more than 35 years of experience in the technology industry, Sanjoy is an innovator who holds 80+ patents from the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO). Sanjoy has a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science and Technology from Indian Institute of Engineering, Science & Technology (IIEST).
